title: The Little Cat
theme: helping a small animal on the way home

sentences.text: Anna walks home from school every day.
sentences.gloss: 安娜每天从学校走回家。

sentences.text: One day she hears a small sound near the road.
sentences.gloss: 有一天，她在路边听见一个很小的声音。

sentences.text: A little cat is under a car and cannot move.
sentences.gloss: 一只小猫在汽车下面，动不了。

sentences.text: Anna is afraid, so she calls her mother for help.
sentences.gloss: 安娜有点害怕，就打电话叫妈妈来帮忙。

sentences.text: Her mother comes and lifts the cat out very slowly.
sentences.gloss: 妈妈来了，很慢地把小猫抱了出来。

sentences.text: They take the cat to a doctor in their town.
sentences.gloss: 他们把小猫送到镇上的医生那里。

sentences.text: The doctor says the cat is only hungry and cold.
sentences.gloss: 医生说，小猫只是又饿又冷。

sentences.text: Now the cat lives with Anna and sleeps on her bed.
sentences.gloss: 现在小猫和安娜住在一起，睡在她的床上。
